description_long: This object consists of two modern office chairs positioned side by side behind a rectangular wooden table. The chairs feature pink cushioned seats and backrests, with ergonomic black and white plastic frames and five-wheeled bases for mobility. The table is made of light-colored wood with a smooth, flat surface and sturdy metal legs, providing ample workspace. The chairs are designed for comfort and support, with contoured backrests and adjustable height mechanisms. The overall setup is functional and suitable for collaborative work or meetings, commonly found in office or conference environments. The combination of materials and colors gives the ensemble a contemporary and professional appearance.
description: A pair of pink cushioned office chairs with ergonomic frames and wheeled bases, placed behind a light wood rectangular table with metal legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pink cushioned seats and backrests of the two chairs aligned behind the wooden table.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the table and the tops of the two pink chair backs visible behind it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, displaying the chairs' profiles and the table's length.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backs of the two chairs with their black and white frames and the table's underside.
